title: Set 4: The Weather Station 🌤️
instructions_en: READ THE STORY. CHOOSE A WORD FROM THE BOX. WRITE THE CORRECT WORD NEXT TO NUMBERS 1–5. THERE IS ONE EXAMPLE.
story_segments: Yesterday, our science class climbed to the top of a high hill to visit the weather
. We wanted to learn how people know if it will be sunny or rainy. A woman named Mary showed us many different

that measure the wind and the rain.

She explained that they check the
every hour to see how hot or cold it is. We watched her write down all the

is very important to everyone," she said. "Farmers need to know about the rain, and pilots need to know about the wind."

While we were there, the

turned grey and we saw many dark clouds. Mary told us that a storm was coming, so we had to leave carefully before the rain started. It was a fascinating trip, and I learned that science is everywhere!

title_question.prompt: Now choose the best name for the story. Write a letter:

options.text: A walk in the dark forest
How to build a high hill

explanations_vi: Cô Mary chỉ cho chúng tôi nhiều thiết bị/dụng cụ (instruments) khác nhau để đo gió và mưa.
Họ kiểm tra nhiệt độ (temperature) mỗi giờ để xem nóng hay lạnh.
Chúng tôi thấy cô ấy ghi lại tất cả thông tin (information) lên một bản đồ lớn.
Môi trường (environment) rất quan trọng đối với mọi người.
Bầu trời (sky) chuyển sang màu xám và có nhiều mây đen.
Tiêu đề B (Tìm hiểu về thời tiết) là đúng nhất vì kể về chuyến đi học hỏi tại trạm thời tiết.
